findings.summary: 4 focus stop(s) have a visible indicator that does not meet the AAA Focus Appearance bar (>= 2px-perimeter area and >= 3:1 contrast). Informative only. e.g. #feedback-name (contrast 2.45), #feedback-email (contrast 2.45), #feedback-message (contrast 2.45), #feedback-name (contrast 2.45)
findings.persona_impact: The focus indicator is present but may be hard to perceive for low-vision users.

findings.summary: 1 declared live region(s) on http://127.0.0.1:8777/async-form-vague-success.html (aria-live/status/alert/log) never produced an announcement during this session: #root > div > div
findings.persona_impact: If this region is meant to announce dynamic updates (e.g. form errors, confirmations), a screen-reader user never hears them on this path.
